expectations.text: The response explicitly mentions reading reference files (e.g. references/events.md) for SDK details
expectations.evidence: No mention of reading reference files like references/events.md. The response provides general knowledge without citing the actual SDK reference documentation.

expectations.text: The response accurately details TextMessageStartEvent attributes (message_id, parent_id, role, index, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Listed attributes are: message_id, role, content_type. Missing: parent_id, index. The content_type attribute was listed but wasn't in the expected list.

expectations.text: The response accurately details TextMessageChunkEvent attributes (message_id, delta, index)
expectations.evidence: Listed attributes are: message_id, index, content, is_complete. Missing: delta. Has 'content' instead of 'delta' as expected.
